name: Edmonds-Karp Algorithm
description: Find max-flow using BFS to find augmenting paths (Edmonds-Karp = Ford-Fulkerson with BFS).
intuition: BFS finds shortest augmenting path each iteration. Augment along that path. BFS guarantees O(VE) augmentations and O(VE^2) total time — polynomial unlike DFS-based Ford-Fulkerson.
